name: Congressional Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, heat the beans in water.
2. Boil gently for 2 minutes. Turn off the heat and let stand for 1 hour.
3. Pour into a slow-cooking pot. Add the remaining ingredients.
4. Cover and cook on low for 12 to 14 hours or until the beans are very soft.
5. Remove the bay leaf and ham bone. Cut the meat off the bone and return it to the beans.
6. Serve hot.
